productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and mustard striped shirt with white accents, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Warm iron Bring the zing back to formal wear with this US Polo shirt. The cotton fabric ensures optimal comfort and the stylish design earns a definite fashion accolade. Pair it with formal trousers, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
